summary: A repost of the 'How It Started vs. How It's Going' meme-format clip: a split-screen of Fox News footage comparing VP Harris's 2021 Guatemala 'do not come' speech ('How it started... All Talk') with Sec. Noem in front of caged detainees at El Salvador's CECOT prison, then two plain blue static text cards ('TODAY, WE'RE PUTTING CRIMINALS BEHIND BARS' / 'UNDER PRESIDENT TRUMP AND SECRETARY NOEM, DHS PUTS AMERICA FIRST'). Audio is the anchors/officials speaking, not music. Repurposed cable-news footage with text-card framing, not youth-appeal produced spectacle.
notable_text: How it started...All Talk; FLASHBACK: VP HARRIS OFFERS WARNING TO MIGRANTS; NOEM: THIS FACILITY IS ONE OF THE TOOLS WE CAN USE; UNDER PRESIDENT TRUMP AND SECRETARY NOEM, DHS PUTS AMERICA FIRST.
